content.json:
# Azure Diagram Builder — Usage Analytics
---
Real-time telemetry from the [Azure Architecture Diagram Builder](https://aka.ms/diagram-builder). Tracks feature usage, AI model performance, user geography, and architecture generation patterns.

> ℹ️ **Coverage:** telemetry launched **2026-04-17** — windows starting earlier will show no data before that date. **"Users" = unique anonymous browsers** (cookie-based `user_Id`), a reach proxy, not verified individuals; `dcount` is an approximation and browser events are not bot-filtered.

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| summarize Value = dcount(user_Id)
| extend Label = "Active Users"
content.title: Active Users

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| summarize Value = dcount(session_Id)
| extend Label = "Sessions"
content.title: Unique Sessions

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| summarize Value = count()
| extend Label = "Total Events"
content.title: Total Events

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where isnotempty(client_CountryOrRegion)
| extend isMsEgress = (ipv4_is_in_any_range(client_IP, '20.0.0.0/6', '172.200.0.0/13') or client_City == 'Boydton' or client_IP == '0.0.0.0')
| where not(isMsEgress)
| summarize Value = dcount(client_CountryOrRegion)
| extend Label = "External countries"
content.title: External Countries

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| summarize Events = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Event Volume Over Time

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| summarize ["Active Users"] = dcount(user_Id) by bin(timestamp, {Granularity})
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Active Users Over Time ({Granularity:label})

content.json:
## Geographic Insights
> Geography is derived from the browser's **egress IP**. Microsoft-managed devices route through Microsoft / Azure egress (Global Secure Access), so they geolocate to Azure datacenters (e.g. Boydton, VA) rather than their real location. The tiles below count distinct **users by `user_Id`** and exclude Microsoft-network egress so external geography is truthful.

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| extend isMsEgress = (ipv4_is_in_any_range(client_IP, '20.0.0.0/6', '172.200.0.0/13') or client_City == 'Boydton' or client_IP == '0.0.0.0')
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by Origin = iff(isMsEgress, 'Microsoft network (geo unreliable)', 'External')
| order by Users desc
content.title: Audience split — real users by egress

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where isnotempty(client_CountryOrRegion)
| extend isMsEgress = (ipv4_is_in_any_range(client_IP, '20.0.0.0/6', '172.200.0.0/13') or client_City == 'Boydton' or client_IP == '0.0.0.0')
| where not(isMsEgress)
| summarize Count = count(), Users = dcount(user_Id) by client_CountryOrRegion
| order by Count desc
content.title: External Users by Country

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where isnotempty(client_CountryOrRegion)
| extend isMsEgress = (ipv4_is_in_any_range(client_IP, '20.0.0.0/6', '172.200.0.0/13') or client_City == 'Boydton' or client_IP == '0.0.0.0')
| where not(isMsEgress)
| summarize
    Events = count(),
    Users = dcount(user_Id),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(client_IP),
    IPs = make_set(client_IP, 5)
  by client_CountryOrRegion, client_City
| order by Events desc
| take 50
content.title: External User Locations — Country / City / IP

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| summarize Count = count(), Users = dcount(user_Id), Sessions = dcount(session_Id) by name
| order by Count desc
content.title: Feature Usage Breakdown

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| summarize Count = count() by name
| order by Count desc
content.title: Feature Distribution

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| summarize
    TotalInstances = count(),
    ActiveUsers = dcount(user_Id),
    UniqueSessions = dcount(session_Id)
  by name
| order by TotalInstances desc
content.title: Feature Usage Detail

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "AI_Model_Usage"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model)
| extend operation = tostring(customDimensions.operation)
| summarize Calls = count() by model, operation
| order by Calls desc
content.title: Model Usage by Operation

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "AI_Model_Usage"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model)
| extend promptTokens = todouble(customMeasurements.promptTokens)
| extend completionTokens = todouble(customMeasurements.completionTokens)
| extend totalTokens = todouble(customMeasurements.totalTokens)
| extend elapsedMs = todouble(customMeasurements.elapsedTimeMs)
| summarize
    TotalCalls = count(),
    AvgPromptTokens = round(avg(promptTokens), 0),
    AvgCompletionTokens = round(avg(completionTokens), 0),
    TotalTokensConsumed = round(sum(totalTokens), 0),
    AvgResponseTimeSec = round(avg(elapsedMs) / 1000, 1),
    P95ResponseTimeSec = round(percentile(elapsedMs, 95) / 1000, 1)
  by model
| order by TotalTokensConsumed desc
content.title: Token Consumption & Latency by Model

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "AI_Model_Usage"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model)
| extend elapsedSec = todouble(customMeasurements.elapsedTimeMs) / 1000
| summarize AvgResponseSec = round(avg(elapsedSec), 1), P95ResponseSec = round(percentile(elapsedSec, 95), 1) by bin(timestamp, 1h), model
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: AI Response Time Trends (seconds)

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "AI_Model_Usage"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model)
| extend reasoningEffort = tostring(customDimensions.reasoningEffort)
| where reasoningEffort != "none"
| summarize Calls = count() by model, reasoningEffort
| order by Calls desc
content.title: Reasoning Effort Selection by Model

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "Architecture_Generated"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model)
| extend services = todouble(customMeasurements.serviceCount)
| extend connections = todouble(customMeasurements.connectionCount)
| extend groups = todouble(customMeasurements.groupCount)
| extend workflows = todouble(customMeasurements.workflowStepCount)
| extend tokens = todouble(customMeasurements.totalTokens)
| extend timeSec = round(todouble(customMeasurements.elapsedTimeMs) / 1000, 1)
| extend isModification = tostring(customDimensions.isModification)
| summarize
    Generations = count(),
    AvgServices = round(avg(services), 1),
    AvgConnections = round(avg(connections), 1),
    AvgGroups = round(avg(groups), 1),
    AvgWorkflowSteps = round(avg(workflows), 1),
    AvgTokens = round(avg(tokens), 0),
    AvgTimeSec = round(avg(timeSec), 1),
    NewArchitectures = countif(isModification == "false"),
    Modifications = countif(isModification == "true")
  by model
| order by Generations desc
content.title: Architecture Generation — Complexity by Model

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "Architecture_Generated"
| extend isModification = iff(tostring(customDimensions.isModification) == "true", "Modification", "New Architecture")
| summarize Count = count() by isModification
content.title: New vs Modification

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "Architecture_Generated"
| summarize Generations = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Architecture Generations Over Time

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "Architecture_Validated"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model)
| extend score = todouble(customMeasurements.overallScore)
| extend findings = todouble(customMeasurements.findingCount)
| extend services = todouble(customMeasurements.serviceCount)
| extend timeSec = round(todouble(customMeasurements.elapsedTimeMs) / 1000, 1)
| summarize
    Validations = count(),
    AvgScore = round(avg(score), 1),
    MaxScore = max(score),
    MinScore = min(score),
    AvgFindings = round(avg(findings), 1),
    AvgServices = round(avg(services), 1),
    AvgTimeSec = round(avg(timeSec), 1)
  by model
| order by Validations desc
content.title: Validation Results by Model

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "Recommendations_Applied"
| extend count_ = todouble(customMeasurements.recommendationCount)
| summarize
    TimesApplied = count(),
    TotalRecommendations = sum(count_),
    AvgPerSession = round(avg(count_), 1)
| extend Label = "Recommendations"
content.title: Recommendations Applied

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "Diagram_Exported"
| extend format = tostring(customDimensions.format)
| extend serviceCount = todouble(customMeasurements.serviceCount)
| summarize
    Exports = count(),
    AvgServices = round(avg(serviceCount), 1)
  by format
| order by Exports desc
content.title: Export Formats

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "Template_Imported"
| extend format = tostring(customDimensions.format)
| extend fileName = tostring(customDimensions.fileName)
| extend resourceCount = todouble(customMeasurements.resourceCount)
| summarize
    Imports = count(),
    AvgResources = round(avg(resourceCount), 1)
  by format
| order by Imports desc
content.title: Template Import Formats

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "Region_Changed"
| extend region = tostring(customDimensions.region)
| summarize Count = count() by region
| order by Count desc
content.title: Azure Region Preferences

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "DeploymentGuide_Generated"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model)
| extend serviceCount = todouble(customMeasurements.serviceCount)
| extend bicepFiles = todouble(customMeasurements.bicepFileCount)
| extend timeSec = round(todouble(customMeasurements.elapsedTimeMs) / 1000, 1)
| summarize
    Guides = count(),
    AvgServices = round(avg(serviceCount), 1),
    AvgBicepFiles = round(avg(bicepFiles), 1),
    AvgTimeSec = round(avg(timeSec), 1)
  by model
| order by Guides desc
content.title: Deployment Guide Generation

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| summarize
    Events = count(),
    Features = make_set(name, 20),
    FirstSeen = min(timestamp),
    LastSeen = max(timestamp),
    Country = take_any(client_CountryOrRegion),
    City = take_any(client_City),
    IP = take_any(client_IP)
  by session_Id, user_Id
| extend DurationMin = round(datetime_diff('second', LastSeen, FirstSeen) / 60.0, 1)
| project User = user_Id, Session = session_Id, Events, DurationMin, Features, Country, City, IP, FirstSeen, LastSeen
| order by LastSeen desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent User Sessions

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| summarize Events = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h), name
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Feature Usage Timeline (stacked)

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name in ("Start_Fresh", "Version_Operation", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared")
| extend detail = case(
    name == "Version_Operation", strcat("op: ", tostring(customDimensions.operation)),
    name == "Models_Compared", strcat("models: ", tostring(customMeasurements.modelsCompared)),
    "")
| project timestamp, name, detail, user_Id, session_Id, client_CountryOrRegion, client_City, client_IP
| order by timestamp desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent Workflow Events

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where isnotempty(user_Id)
| summarize MAU = dcount(user_Id) by Month = startofmonth(timestamp)
| order by Month asc
content.title: Monthly Active Users

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
let firstSeen = DB_EVENTS
  | where isnotempty(user_Id)
  | summarize FirstSeen = min(timestamp) by user_Id;
DB_EVENTS
| where isnotempty(user_Id)
| join kind=leftouter firstSeen on user_Id
| extend Week = startofweek(timestamp),
         UserType = iff(startofweek(FirstSeen) == startofweek(timestamp), "New", "Returning")
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by Week, UserType
| order by Week asc
content.title: New vs Returning Users (by week)

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "Region_Changed"
| extend region = tolower(tostring(customDimensions.region))
| summarize Count = count() by region
| top 12 by Count desc
content.title: Top Azure Regions Selected (Region_Changed)

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
DB_EVENTS
| where name == "DeploymentGuide_Generated"
| extend model = tolower(tostring(customDimensions.model))
| extend serviceCount = todouble(customMeasurements.serviceCount)
| extend bicepFiles = todouble(customMeasurements.bicepFileCount)
| extend timeSec = round(todouble(customMeasurements.elapsedTimeMs) / 1000, 1)
| summarize
    Guides = count(),
    Users = dcount(user_Id),
    AvgServices = round(avg(serviceCount), 1),
    AvgBicepFiles = round(avg(bicepFiles), 1),
    AvgTimeSec = round(avg(timeSec), 1)
  by model
| order by Guides desc
content.title: Deployment Guides Generated (by model)

content.query:
let DB_EVENTS = customEvents | where name in ("Architecture_Generated", "Architecture_Validated", "DeploymentGuide_Generated", "Diagram_Exported", "Template_Imported", "ARM_Template_Imported", "Image_Imported", "Models_Compared", "Recommendations_Applied", "Version_Operation", "Region_Changed", "Start_Fresh", "AI_Model_Usage");
let cohorts = DB_EVENTS
  | where isnotempty(user_Id)
  | summarize FirstSeen = startofweek(min(timestamp)) by user_Id;
DB_EVENTS
| where isnotempty(user_Id)
| extend Week = startofweek(timestamp)
| join kind=inner cohorts on user_Id
| extend WeekOffset = datetime_diff('week', Week, FirstSeen)
| summarize Users = dcount(user_Id) by Cohort = FirstSeen, WeekOffset
| evaluate pivot(WeekOffset, sum(Users))
| order by Cohort desc
content.title: Weekly Cohort Retention (% returning in week N)
